about.title: Who I am
about.body:
I started my career in technology working as a Pentester on multinational teams for 3 years, having exposure to multiple technologies and observing web application security practices across diverse scenarios.

However, after my first contact with software development while creating a POS system for my ex-girlfriend's business, I realized I felt much more fulfilled with that than with pentest projects, so I decided to make a career transition to work in software development.

I currently work as a Frontend Developer, translating business needs into features, focusing on user experience and solving real problems. I enjoy the creative aspect of bringing designs to life and the satisfaction of seeing users interacting with interfaces I've built. My work involves collaborating closely with designers and backend developers to create responsive and fluid applications that users love.

My long-term goal as a developer is to become an expert in the Javascript stack, from frontend in the browser to backend on the server, and to be a go-to reference end-to-end in this space.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.description: I'm always open to discussing new projects, creative ideas, or collaboration opportunities.
